## Testing Done

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on `main` and is up to date
- [ ] Commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for the affected tool(s)
- [ ] If a new tool: tool folder follows the required layout in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] If a new tool: main `README.md` What's Inside table and repo structure tree updated
- [ ] No external CDN links or network requests added
- [ ] No `innerHTML` used with un-sanitised input
